tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: The thistle is the national flower of this country
The shamrock is the traditional symbol of this country
The kiwi bird is the national symbol of this country
Loch Ness is a famous lake known for its legendary monster
St Patrick's Day on 17 March is celebrated in this country
The haka is a traditional Maori war dance from this country
Edinburgh is the capital city of this country
The Cliffs of Moher are a famous coastal landmark here
Milford Sound is a spectacular fjord in this country
The maple leaf is the national symbol of this country
The leek is the national emblem of this country
The bald eagle appears on the Great Seal of this country
